title: Do you use monday.com as a Test Case Management System?
excerpt: I am trying to see if Monday.com is able to function as a Test Management System. The basic things that I am looking to achieve is to be able create test cases within Monday.com, run test cycles, view and create a report…

posts.author: dennis-aE.solutions (Dennis Ingles)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to see if Monday.com is able to function as a Test Management System. The basic things that I am looking to achieve is to be able create test cases within Monday.com, run test cycles, view and create a report of a test cycle result. I understand that automation is needed to achieve this. I am curious if anyone has tried it before and maybe can share their experiences.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dennis-aE.solutions

Welcome to the Community!

I’d love to understand a little more about your use case in order to better advise here.
Can you let me know a little more about the kind of data you’d track for test cases, and how you’d like to report on them? We can then make some more tailored recommendations on how you might like to achieve this

You might also like to check out https://stories.monday.com/ - this is where our users post their own workflows they’ve created, and you can download templates of these straight into your account.

Look forward to hearing back from you!

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dennis-aE.solutions!

Just wanted to check in here and see if you were able to get your workflow set up?
We’d be happy to assist with any outstanding questions you have

Look forward to hearing back from you!

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi again @dennis-aE.solutions

As we haven’t had any updates here, I’m going to go ahead and mark this thread as closed.

If you have any additional questions or you feel your original query wasn’t resolved, please feel free to let us know and we’ll be happy to continue to assist!

Best,

Dani
